group_name: Percentage of adult social care beds occupied
description: The percentage of occupied beds recorded by care providers across social care compared to the number of beds available.
denominator_description: Number of beds recorded by care providers
limitations: Capacity Tracker data is self-reported by care providers, who update it at different times throughout the month. This means the data does not provide a snapshot of all providers at the same point in time. Instead, it represents the most recent information available from each provider when the data was retrieved.

group_name: Median occupancy percentage of adult social care beds provided by a care provider location
description: The average (median) percentage of occupied beds recorded by care providers across social care compared to the number of beds avilable.
denominator_description: Number of beds recorded by care providers
limitations: Capacity Tracker data is self-reported by care providers, who update it at different times throughout the month. This means the data does not provide a snapshot of all providers at the same point in time. Instead, it represents the most recent information available from each provider when the data was retrieved.

group_name: Percentage of population between the age of 18 and 64
description: The percentage of individuals that are between 18 and 64 years in age compared to the total population.
numerator_description: Population between the age of 18 and 64

group_name: Percentage of population over the age of 65
description: The percentage of individuals over the age of 65 years compared to the total population

group_name: Percentage of population over the age of 75
description: The percentage of individuals over the age of 75 years compared to the total population

group_name: Percentage of population over the age of 85
description: The percentage of individuals over the age of 85 years compared to the total population

group_name: Percentage of disabled adult population
description: The percentage of individuals who report having any physical or menthal health conditions of illnesses lasting or expected to last 12 months or more.
numerator_description: Adults reporting any physical or mental health condition or illnesses lasting or expected to last 12 months or more
